TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Walker_Banks, title = Walker_Banks, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Walker_Banks} }

S.FORM: Walker Banks sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1947, ryax sa tay 26 nqu tay 8, Walker Banks, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Walker Banks sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1947, ryax sa tay 26 nqu tay 8, Walker Banks, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: walker βanks~ɕ s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, walker βanks~ɕ, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
